attributes.description: Summary of node configurations and resource utilization.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links for Elasticsearch report and summary dashboards
embeddableConfig.title: Elasticsearch

embeddableConfig.description: Count of nodes by distinct combination of roles. Each data tier should have a unique role combination, along with other dedicated node types like master, ML or coordinating nodes.
embeddableConfig.title: Nodes by Role

embeddableConfig.description: Ideal of 1. This is the unique count each item. Every node with the same role should have the same configuration and versions.
embeddableConfig.title: Configuration Variations

embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of used heap memory. When using Garbage-First Garbage Collector (G1GC) consistently operating around 80% is expected. Sustained values over 90% is an indicator of high memory pressure.
Percent of disk utilization where 100% is full. Frozen nodes are still considered healthy at 90%+ utilization because of how the shared cache pre-reserves space.
The node's normalized CPU utilization where 100% is considered full usage across all cores.
embeddableConfig.title: System Load % Boxplot

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes in each heap usage percent range. Nodes over 90% indicate high memory pressure and may impact stability.
embeddableConfig.title: Heap Usage Percent

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes in each disk usage percentage range. Dedicated data_frozen nodes will report 90% by default.
embeddableConfig.title: Storage Usage Percent

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes in each CPU percentage range. This CPU percent is normalized for CPU cores; maximum of 100% is all cores loaded.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU Percent

embeddableConfig.description: Percentage of time spent on each workload category
embeddableConfig.title: Node Workload Distribution

embeddableConfig.description: Average node disk usage per tier
embeddableConfig.title: Disk Used Avg

embeddableConfig.description: Total storage of all node in a tier
embeddableConfig.title: Disk Used Total

embeddableConfig.description: Total amount of CPU time spent on each workload category
embeddableConfig.title: Node Workload Total Time

embeddableConfig.description: Number of nodes with each unique combination of roles
embeddableConfig.title: Nodes per Tier

embeddableConfig.description: Average allocated disk per node
embeddableConfig.title: Node Disk Size

embeddableConfig.description: The total size of allocated data in a data tier. Includes data in partially mounted searchable snapshots.
embeddableConfig.title: Dataset Total

embeddableConfig.description: The average size of allocated data per node. Includes data in partially mounted searchable snapshots.
embeddableConfig.title: Node Dataset Average

embeddableConfig.description: The total number of documents allocated in a data tier. Includes documents in partially mounted searchable snapshots.
embeddableConfig.title: Docs Total

embeddableConfig.description: The average number of documents allocated on each node. Includes documents in partially mounted searchable snapshots.
embeddableConfig.title: Node Docs Average

embeddableConfig.description: The total number of shards allocated in each data tier.
embeddableConfig.title: Shards Total

embeddableConfig.description: The average number of shards allocated per node.
embeddableConfig.title: Node Shards Average
